results.title: Confidentiality Obligations
results._source_text_exact: 1.1 Each Receiving Party shall hold the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent, except to Representatives bound by confidentiality obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.
results.original_text: 1.1 Each Receiving Party shall hold the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent, except to Representatives bound by confidentiality obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.
results.reasoning_evidence: 1.1 Each Receiving Party shall hold the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without pr
results.quoted_text: Each Receiving Party shall hold the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent, except to Representatives bound by confidentiality obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.
results.explanation_simple: The clause establishes confidentiality obligations for the Receiving Party regarding the Disclosing Party's information.
results.why_it_matters: This clause protects sensitive information from unauthorized disclosure, which is crucial for maintaining competitive advantage and trust.
results.legal_insight: This clause affects who sits on the board, how directors are appointed, which matters require enhanced approval, and how governance deadlocks are resolved.
results.recommendation: Check board composition and how each seat is designated, which matters are reserved for enhanced approval, whether a deadlock-resolution mechanism exists, and how director removal or replacement works.

section_path: 1. OBLIGATIONS OF CONFIDENTIALITY

1.1 Each Receiving Party shall hold the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent, except to Representatives bound by confidentiality obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.
risk_reasons: Confidentiality obligations may continue beyond contract termination.

results.title: Use of Confidential Information
results._source_text_exact: 1.2 Each Receiving Party shall use the Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.

results.reasoning_evidence: 1.2 Each Receiving Party shall use the Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.
results.quoted_text: Each Receiving Party shall use the Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.
results.explanation_simple: The clause restricts the use of Confidential Information to a specific Purpose.
results.why_it_matters: This limitation helps protect sensitive information from being misused.
results.legal_insight: This clause restricts what the receiving party may actually do with the confidential information, independent of whether it keeps it secret.

results.title: Confidential Information Exclusions
results._source_text_exact: 2.1 Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) was rightfully known to the Receiving Party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed without use of the Confidential Information; or (d) is rightfully received from a third party without duty of confidentiality.
results.original_text: 2.1 Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) was rightfully known to the Receiving Party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed without use of the Confidential Information; or (d) is rightfully received from a third party without duty of confidentiality.
results.reasoning_evidence: 2.1 Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) was rightfully
results.quoted_text: Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) was rightfully known to the Receiving Party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed without use of the Confidential Information; or (d) is rightfully received from a third party without duty of confidentiality.
results.explanation_simple: This clause outlines the exceptions to what constitutes Confidential Information.
results.legal_insight: This clause defines what falls OUTSIDE the definition of confidential information, limiting the practical reach of the non-disclosure obligation.
results.recommendation: Confirm the exclusions are limited to the four standard carve-outs (public without breach, already known, independently developed, lawfully received from a third party) and are not broader than that.

section_path: 2. EXCLUSIONS

2.1 Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) was rightfully known to the Receiving Party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed without use of the Confidential Information; or (d) is rightfully received from a third party without duty of confidentiality.
risk_reasons: Confidentiality obligations may continue beyond contract termination.

legal_insight.text_before_validation: This clause defines what falls OUTSIDE the definition of confidential information, limiting the practical reach of the non-disclosure obligation.

recommendation.text_before_validation: Confirm the exclusions are limited to the four standard carve-outs (public without breach, already known, independently developed, lawfully received from a third party) and are not broader than that.

results.title: Duration and Confidentiality Obligations
results._source_text_exact: 3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.
results.original_text: 3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.
results.reasoning_evidence: 3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (
results.quoted_text: This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.
results.explanation_simple: The agreement has a defined duration and specifies the survival period for confidentiality obligations.
results.why_it_matters: Clearly defined timeframes for the agreement and confidentiality obligations help manage expectations and legal responsibilities.
results.legal_insight: The clause establishes a clear two-year term for the agreement and a five-year term for confidentiality obligations, which is standard in many agreements. The provision for trade secrets to survive indefinitely aligns with legal protections for such information.
results.market_comparison: The duration and confidentiality terms are typical in commercial agreements, providing a reasonable balance between parties' interests.

section_path: 3. TERM AND SURVIVAL

3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.
risk_reasons: Confidentiality obligations may continue beyond contract termination.
Compliance provisions may create ongoing legal, regulatory, or policy obligations.

legal_insight.text_before_validation: The clause establishes a clear two-year term for the agreement and a five-year term for confidentiality obligations, which is standard in many agreements. The provision for trade secrets to survive indefinitely aligns with legal protections for such information.

market_comparison.text_before_validation: The duration and confidentiality terms are typical in commercial agreements, providing a reasonable balance between parties' interests.

results.title: Confidential Information Ownership
results._source_text_exact: 4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.
results.original_text: 4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.
results.reasoning_evidence: 4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without
results.quoted_text: 4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.
results.explanation_simple: The clause clarifies that no rights to the Confidential Information are granted.
results.why_it_matters: This ensures that the receiving party does not gain any ownership or licensing rights over the Confidential Information.
results.legal_insight: The clause protects the disclosing party by maintaining their ownership of the Confidential Information and limiting liability by providing it 'as is'.
results.market_comparison: This clause is standard in confidentiality agreements.
results.recommendation: Check the accuracy of representations, warranty scope, exclusions, remedy periods, disclaimers, reliance limits, and interaction with liability caps.
section_path: 4. NO LICENSE OR WARRANTY
4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

market_comparison.text_before_validation: This clause is standard in confidentiality agreements.

recommendation.text_before_validation: Check the accuracy of representations, warranty scope, exclusions, remedy periods, disclaimers, reliance limits, and interaction with liability caps.

results.title: Confidential Information Disclosure
results._source_text_exact: 5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.
results.original_text: 5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.
results.reasoning_evidence: 5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequat
results.quoted_text: Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.
results.explanation_simple: The clause allows for injunctive relief in case of unauthorized disclosure of confidential information.
results.why_it_matters: This provision emphasizes the seriousness of unauthorized disclosures and provides a mechanism for immediate legal recourse.
results.market_comparison: This clause is relatively standard in confidentiality agreements, emphasizing the importance of protecting sensitive information.
results.recommendation: The clause effectively protects the interests of the non-breaching Party by allowing for injunctive relief.

source_evidence.label: CONFIDENTIALITY_REMEDY
source_evidence.text: unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.

results.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
results._source_text_exact: 6.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict of laws principles. section_path: 6. GOVERNING LAW AND DISPUTE RESOLUTION

6.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict of laws principles. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware.

section_path: 2. EXCLUSIONS

section_path: 3. TERM AND SURVIVAL

3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.

clauses.title: Confidential Information Disclosure
clauses._source_text_exact: 5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.

section_path: 5. REMEDIES

5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.

section_path: 3. TERM AND SURVIVAL

3.1 This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date. The confidentiality obligations herein shall survive for a period of five (5) years following disclosure of the applicable Confidential Information, except that obligations with respect to trade secrets shall survive for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.
risk_reasons: Confidentiality obligations may continue beyond contract termination.
Compliance provisions may create ongoing legal, regulatory, or policy obligations.

clauses.title: Confidential Information Disclosure
clauses._source_text_exact: 5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.

section_path: 5. REMEDIES

5.1 Each Party acknowledges that unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy, and that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other available remedies, without the necessity of posting bond.

clauses.title: Confidential Information Ownership
clauses._source_text_exact: 4.1 Nothing in this Agreement grants any license or ownership interest in the Confidential Information. All Confidential Information is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

section_path: 6. GOVERNING LAW AND DISPUTE RESOLUTION

6.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict of laws principles. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware.

Restrictive commitments may reduce commercial or operational flexibility.
